content:
- Picked up task from .ralph/current_task.txt -> story-full-verification/04-task-resolve-failures-and-revalidate-full-suite.md and found it at TO BE VERIFIED.
- Ran a deep skeptical verification pass with 16 parallel checks over bug task status tags, lifecycle markers, Makefile gates, sibling story-task conventions, and evidence tree.
- Updated task 04 plan to Draft 2, changed at least one thing (added auditable bug-inventory + pending-status artifacts), and promoted marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Executed plan: created task-04 evidence dir, generated bug-inventory.log/bug-pending-status.log, ran full gates serially with CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 and pipefail+tee, then generated grep marker artifacts and BDD failure extract.
- All required gates passed: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint.
- Updated task 04 acceptance checkboxes to complete, set <status>done</status> <passes>true</passes> <passing>true</passing>, and added execution_report + bug inventory summary.
- Ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully.
- Added AGENTS.md learning: for closure-only bug-remediation tasks, always archive bug-inventory + pending-status logs to make no-active-bugs claims auditable.
- Committed all changes (including .ralph evidence/state files) as commit 130dc58 with required task-finished message format.
- Next: stop now per task instructions; wait for next task pointer from Ralph loop.

- Ran progress_read for Choose-Task, then parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md and confirmed bug-first status.
- All bug tasks currently show <passes>true</passes>/<passing>true</passing>, so no active failing bug to prioritize.
- Identified remaining <passes>false</passes> tasks; deprioritized 16-task-debug-ui... due explicit <priority>low</priority> and treated 19/20/21 as blocked meta-pass chain items.
- Chose unblocked normal-priority task with highest risk-reduction value: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/task-real-ha-dcs-process-integration-tests.md.
- Wrote selected path to .ralph/current_task.txt and verified file contents.
- Next time: execute that integration-test task, then rerun gate flow as task requires.

- Read prior progress via .ralph/progress_read.sh and loaded active pointer from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Opened .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/task-real-ha-dcs-process-integration-tests.md; task had no TO BE VERIFIED/NOW EXECUTE marker and was status not_started.
- Ran broad parallel exploration over HA/DCS/process/pginfo/test_harness modules (12-track scan) to ground a concrete implementation plan.
- Wrote a full Draft 1 execution plan into the task file, including a file-by-file exhaustive modification checklist, implementation phases, risks/mitigations, gate/evidence plan, and completion bookkeeping.
- Appended terminal marker TO BE VERIFIED at end of task plan, per workflow.
- Did not execute implementation or gates in this turn; stopping now so next turn can perform deep skeptical verification and alter at least one plan item before switching to NOW EXECUTE.

- Loaded current task .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/task-real-ha-dcs-process-integration-tests.md and found marker TO BE VERIFIED.
- Ran deep skeptical verification with 18 parallel tracks across ha/dcs/process/pginfo/test_harness/make/state modules.
- Verified existing real HA pipeline coverage lives in src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs; draft-1 plan target (src/ha/worker.rs) was likely suboptimal.
- Updated task execution plan to Draft 2, explicitly changed implementation target to src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs, added enforced real-binary verification, and switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Corrected a plan-file duplication mistake by truncating to a single execution plan block ending with NOW EXECUTE.
